project_type: Full-stack Institute ERP with Python FastAPI backend and React TypeScript frontend
build_system: pip for backend, npm/vite for frontend
test_framework: pytest with TestClient for backend (tests/ directory with conftest.py fixtures), vitest for frontend
verification_instructions: 1. Run backend tests: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v. 2. Run frontend build: cd frontend && npm run build. 3. Verify no TypeScript errors in build output.
setup_instructions: 1. cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt. 2. cd frontend && npm install.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. SQLite database for dev/test.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing code patterns. Backend uses success_response/error_response/paginated_response helpers. Frontend uses api service for HTTP calls. Tests use conftest.py fixtures.
key_patterns: Backend: FastAPI routers with /api/<role> prefix, SQLAlchemy ORM, serialize_* helper functions in admin.py, success_response wrapper. Frontend: React hooks with useEffect/useState, api.get/post pattern, common components (StatCard, Card, Table, Modal, Badge). Response format: { success: true, data: ... }
directory_structure: backend/app/routes/ - API route files per role. backend/app/models/ - SQLAlchemy models. backend/tests/ - pytest test files. frontend/src/pages/<role>/ - page components per role. frontend/src/components/common/ - shared UI components.
